summary: Iteration 230 — Safety Branch MVP (Ramo Sicurezza) Testing Complete. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: All 4 steps of multi-step form working correctly. All features verified: cantieri_sicurezza CRUD, libreria_rischi with 20 seed items (10 DPI + 10 fasi_lavoro), gate_pos completeness check, multi-step form navigation and data persistence.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: session token test_perizia_205a45704b22, user_id user_perizia_de75ff42, existing cantiere cant_9716558dc2ba with 55% gate completion.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Safety Branch MVP fully working. Key features verified: (1) POST /api/cantieri-sicurezza creates new cantiere with defaults (8 DPI, 8 machines, 4 emergency numbers), (2) GET /api/cantieri-sicurezza lists all cantieri with gate_pos_status, (3) PUT /api/cantieri-sicurezza/{id} supports partial updates and recalculates gate, (4) DELETE /api/cantieri-sicurezza/{id} works correctly, (5) GET /api/cantieri-sicurezza/{id}/gate returns completeness check, (6) GET /api/libreria-rischi returns 20 items (10 DPI + 10 fasi_lavoro), (7) GET /api/libreria-rischi?tipo=dpi/fase_lavoro filters correctly, (8) GET /api/libreria-rischi/fasi/{normativa} returns applicable phases, (9) POST /api/libreria-rischi/seed is idempotent. Frontend: /sicurezza list page shows table with columns (Cantiere, Committente, Lavoratori, Fasi, Gate%, Stato), 'Nuova Scheda Cantiere' button creates and navigates to detail page, /scheda-cantiere/{id} has 4 steps (Cantiere, Fasi Lavoro, Macchine & DPI, Riepilogo), all form fields have data-testid attributes, Save button persists data correctly.

gate_pos.completeness_calculation: PASSED - Calculates percentage based on required/optional fields
gate_pos.missing_fields: PASSED - Reports missing required fields correctly
gate_pos.ready_status: PASSED - pronto_per_generazione=true when all required fields filled

frontend_sicurezza_page.list_display: PASSED - Shows table with Cantiere, Committente, Lavoratori, Fasi, Gate, Stato columns
frontend_sicurezza_page.new_button: PASSED - 'Nuova Scheda Cantiere' creates and navigates to detail page
frontend_sicurezza_page.row_click: PASSED - Clicking row navigates to detail page

frontend_scheda_cantiere_page.step_navigation: PASSED - 4 step tabs (Cantiere, Fasi Lavoro, Macchine & DPI, Riepilogo)
frontend_scheda_cantiere_page.step1_cantiere: PASSED - Form fields for dati_cantiere, soggetti_riferimento, lavoratori, subappalti
frontend_scheda_cantiere_page.step2_fasi_lavoro: PASSED - Shows 10 fasi from libreria_rischi with toggle selection
frontend_scheda_cantiere_page.step3_macchine_dpi: PASSED - Shows macchine list and DPI checkbox grid
frontend_scheda_cantiere_page.step4_riepilogo: PASSED - Shows gate_pos status (progress bar, missing fields, ready status)
frontend_scheda_cantiere_page.save_button: PASSED - Persists data to backend via PUT
